{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221127070574449247D27D50BF71"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7229977503275057978","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书现在又更新了不少，作者还是非常努力更新的，我没有搞懂的是，为什么现在灾难这么严重？还要去增援未来呀？为什么要让小孩去增援未来？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683360429,"group_id":"7221915235408415803","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4415272491688999"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221915235408415803","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.127112e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7229704119370826533","common":{"comment_type":99,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书还是蛮精彩的，虽然是一本网文小说，但是看完依然能学到很多知识，主要还是人性的方面，他告诉我们，在绝对的利益面前，没有什么关系是牢固的。
这本书是讲轮回关系的，末日的降临是由神秘的力量导致的，而主人公穿梭在其中，不断的寻找着真相"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683296747,"group_id":"7221915235408415803","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无人扶我青云志","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyrCr8XRJW0+rx1do+9OTCJhnvEMXA7++4Kc3tJ+wa8N","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4415272491688999","user_name":"杨再兴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4415272491688999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221915235408415803","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+囤货+科幻+时间轮回+解密】
吃别人的心脏就能夺舍别人的能力？
神秘的球型飞船降临，将地球变成了一个大冰球？
在冰天雪地之后，地球又会发生何种变化？是炎热？还是大雨？还是瘟疫？还是丧尸？
人类该如何面对着一切未知的灾难？
谁操控了这一切？
地球为何突然降温？
他又为何重生？
灾难降临之前，顶尖的科学家为何集体消失？
是谁运走了大批物资？
随着更多信息的不断解密，一个神秘的计划浮出水面，为何将无数婴儿冰冻？
掌握大量物资的执行人又是什么身份？
我们要去增援未来吗？
更重要的是，为何主角不断的在末世中轮回？
为何他的异能一只在变换？
......
灾难考验的更是人性和道德，一次次重生之后的张龙将不再心软，取而代之的将是心狠手辣。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o0422038e2d9785947f2a2b932334905f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"杨再兴","author_id":"","book_id":"7221915235408415803","book_name":"末日轮回：下一种灾难是什么？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221915422822662656","read_count":"20","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"124719"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"55","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0422038e2d9785947f2a2b932334905f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779334027&x-signature=rOPJ3lBy%2BnLb9WkyHleqiqyRQls%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4415272491688999","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.121647e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322112707057
